commands.name: manage-users
commands.title: Manage Users & Apps
commands.subtitle: ADB
commands.description: List users and apps for connected device

commands.name: install-apk
commands.title: Install APK
commands.subtitle: ADB
commands.description: Install an APK to connected device

commands.name: take-screenshot
commands.title: Take Screenshot
commands.subtitle: ADB
commands.description: Take a screenshot of connected device and copy to clipboard

commands.name: manage-devices
commands.title: Manage Devices
commands.subtitle: ADB
commands.description: List, pair, and connect to Android devices wirelessly

preferences.name: adbPath
preferences.title: ADB Executable Path
preferences.description: Path to the ADB executable (e.g. /usr/local/bin/adb, or leave empty if in PATH)

preferences.name: showSystemProfiles
preferences.title: Show System Profiles
preferences.description: Show system-created profiles like Dual App, Secure Folder, etc.
preferences.label: Show System Profiles

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
